reason: 未通過 permutation test — 策略 M2+ 不優於 random 3-bet baseline

root_cause_analysis.primary: Bet overlap reduces effective coverage. Strategy 3-bets average 13.4 unique numbers (34.4% of 39). Random non-overlapping 3-bets cover 15 unique numbers (38.5% of 39). The ~4% coverage gap translates directly to lower M2+ rate.
root_cause_analysis.secondary: GapPressure and ZoneShift tend to select similar numbers as SumRange when zone deviation is not extreme, causing high overlap between bets.
root_cause_analysis.note: The old strategy (SumRange+Bayesian+ZoneBalance) is ALSO below random baseline (-1.84% to -4.64% edge). Neither strategy passes permutation test.

positive_findings.new_vs_old: NEW significantly better than OLD (McNemar chi2=5.89, p=0.0152)
positive_findings.new_vs_theoretical: NEW consistently above theoretical baseline (+1.02% to +1.56%)
positive_findings.modules_valid: GapPressureScorer and ZoneShiftDetector are valid building blocks — the issue is combination overlap, not individual prediction quality

future_retest_conditions: Add orthogonalization layer to enforce minimum 14+ unique numbers across bets
Use exclude set to prevent bet overlap (pass used numbers to subsequent predictors)
Consider 4-bet or 5-bet structure where coverage naturally increases
Test bet diversity scoring: penalize combos with high inter-bet overlap
old_strategy_status: ALSO UNVERIFIED — SumRange+Bayesian+ZoneBalance shows -1.84% to -4.64% edge vs baseline. Neither old nor new passes random 3-bet baseline.
